name: Prompt Injection Benchmark v1
description: Standardized benchmark for testing AI safety scanners across 7 threat categories plus benign controls.
author: 15 Research Lab

categories.name: Prompt Injection
categories.description: Detection of attempts to override, manipulate, or inject instructions into AI systems.

categories.name: Jailbreak
categories.description: Detection of attempts to bypass AI safety constraints through social engineering or framing.

categories.name: PII Detection
categories.description: Detection of personally identifiable information in text.

categories.name: Credential Detection
categories.description: Detection of API keys, tokens, passwords, and other secrets in text.

categories.name: Memory Poisoning
categories.description: Detection of attempts to poison AI memory, RAG systems, or cross-session state.

categories.name: Code Safety
categories.description: Detection of dangerous code patterns including injection, traversal, and deserialization.

categories.name: Data Exfiltration
categories.description: Detection of attempts to exfiltrate data through various covert channels.
